sectionsUnavailable: Authenticated Sequencing.com sample report rows are not available yet.
No calibrated fitness trait, training-response, injury-risk, recovery, VO2 max, or sport-suitability model is supplied with this fixture.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACTN3 rs1815739 CC call is available. This is trait context only and does not predict strength, speed, endurance, or athletic ability.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACTN3 is one of the best-studied genes in athletic-performance research, but fitness outcomes are shaped by many genetic and non-genetic factors.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived ACE DD context row is available. This is not enough to choose sports, prescribe workouts, estimate VO2 max, or predict training response.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: ACE is discussed in athletic-performance research, but training history, health, environment, opportunity, and many other factors remain important.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: No calibrated fitness trait score, training-response model, injury-risk model, recovery model, VO2 max model, or ancestry applicability metadata is supplied.
resultRows.sourceLabel: NHGRI polygenic risk scores / GWAS Catalog
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can describe supplied marker context, but it should not quantify performance, injury, recovery, or training probabilities without a validated model.

fitnessContext: Use the report as educational fitness genetics context, not as a training plan.
Plan training, injury prevention, recovery, and performance goals with qualified coaches or health professionals.
Do not use genotype alone for sport selection, supplement decisions, medical exercise clearance, or expectations about athletic ability.

references.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores

missingInputs: Authenticated sample-report sections and rows have not been extracted.
No calibrated fitness performance, training-response, injury-risk, recovery, VO2 max, or sport-suitability model is supplied.
No training history, injury history, sleep, nutrition, medical history, fitness testing, or coach assessment is supplied.
uncertainty: Fitness and athletic performance are complex traits influenced by genetics, training, health, sleep, nutrition, environment, opportunity, and many other factors.
A small number of markers cannot explain fitness, talent, injury risk, recovery, or training response.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not predict elite ability, prescribe training, recommend sport selection, estimate injury risk, estimate recovery, quantify VO2 max, recommend supplements, or provide medical exercise clearance.
Authenticated Sequencing.com sample report rows are still pending.
